chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1377 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.2502/2023 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of CMA No.2503/2023 (C/A) 06.03.2024 Mr. Abdul Salam Shaikh, Associate of Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Qaribullah Soomro, Deputy Director Food, Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG has filed statement / compliance report on behalf of respondent No.2 along with a copy of offer order for the post of Junior Clerk (BPS-11) in Food Department, Sukkur Food Region against deceased quota in favour of the petitioner. A copy of which has been provided to learned Counsel for the petitioner, who is satisfied and seeks disposal of the contempt application. Accordingly, both the listed applications are disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
